Source: Perplexity API Documentation
URL: https://docs.perplexity.ai
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Perplexity API Documentation

## Available APIs
- Agent API: Third-party models with web search tools and presets
- Search API: Raw, ranked web search results with filtering
- Embeddings API: High-quality embeddings for semantic search and RAG

## Core Capabilities
- Web search filtering by domain and recency
- Structured JSON responses via schema validation
- Multi-language SDK support (Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, cURL)
- Query batching for Search API
- Real-time data access across web sources

## Recent Model References
- OpenAI GPT-5.4 and GPT-5.2 variants
- Sonar Pro, Sonar Pro Reasoning
